$comment: Project PPP binding for OpenCode. The .ppp library and .opencode/plugins/ppp.ts are the source of truth for PPP tools in this repository.
name: Elbmesh
instructions: Use ppp_* OpenCode plugin tools for PPP task bundles, validation guidance, dependency guidance, reusable PPP blocks, and repo context.
Use ppp_get_repo_config and ppp_resolve_repo_context when resolving this repo's ppp.repo-config.json.
Use repoKey elbmesh when resolving PPP context for this repository.
